operational_knowledge_units.title: Aveva API incorporates selected Geek+ RMS AGV control features
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that selected features from Geek+ RMS were incorporated into the Aveva APIs for ease of use and continuity. Listed AGV-related capabilities are Remove AGV, Recover AGV, Pause all AGVs, and Resume all AGVs.
observed_evidence: 'For ease of use and continuity, we incorporated select features from Geek+ RMS into our APIs.'
Listed features: 'Remove AGV', 'Recover AGV', 'Pause all AGVs', 'Resume all AGVs'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Aveva API page for AGVs includes selected Geek+ RMS features: Remove AGV, Recover AGV, Pause all AGVs, Resume all AGVs. The slide presents these as incorporated API capabilities for ease of use and continuity.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Aveva API provides AGV recovery mechanisms for RMS crash scenarios
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide indicates that recovery mechanisms were implemented for RMS crash events. These include Execute AGV command and Resend Geek Command functions to address missed callbacks and errored Geek commands.
observed_evidence: 'In the event of an RMS crash, we have also implemented recovery mechanisms.'
'Enables users to specify an AGV ID that has completed its task when RMS fails to send a callback.'
'Allows users to specify a command GUID that was sent to Geek but encountered an error.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: For RMS crash recovery, the Aveva API page includes Execute AGV command and Resend Geek Command. Execute AGV command is used when RMS fails to send a callback for an AGV that completed its task. Resend Geek Command is used when a command GUID sent to Geek encountered an error.

operational_knowledge_units.title: RMS failure can leave completed AGV tasks without callback confirmation
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide describes a failure mode where RMS crashes and does not send a callback even though an AGV has completed its task, requiring manual specification of the AGV ID through the API recovery mechanism.
observed_evidence: 'Enables users to specify an AGV ID that has completed its task when RMS fails to send a callback.'
This statement appears under the recovery mechanism 'Execute AGV command'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: A documented RMS failure mode is that RMS may fail to send a callback after an AGV completes its task. The API recovery concept is to specify the AGV ID using Execute AGV command.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Errored Geek command GUIDs can be retried through Resend Geek Command
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide identifies a recovery/diagnostic concept where users can provide a command GUID for a command previously sent to Geek that encountered an error, and use Resend Geek Command to retry it.
observed_evidence: 'Allows users to specify a command GUID that was sent to Geek but encountered an error.'

relationships.target: commands sent to Geek that encountered an error

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Resend Geek Command is a recovery capability on the Aveva API page. It allows a user to specify a command GUID for a command sent to Geek that encountered an error.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Execute AGV command after RMS fails to send a completion callback
preconditions: An RMS crash or RMS callback failure has occurred
The AGV has completed its task
The user has the AGV ID
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide lists the Aveva API page recovery capability 'Execute AGV command' and explains that users can specify an AGV ID when RMS fails to send a callback.

steps.instruction: Open the Aveva API page and locate the 'Execute AGV command' recovery function.
steps.expected_outcome: The relevant API recovery function is identified for use.
steps.validation_check: The slide names 'Execute AGV command' as the recovery mechanism.
steps.visual_region_hint: Slide body bullet list under 'In the event of an RMS crash, we have also implemented recovery mechanisms.'

steps.instruction: Specify the AGV ID for the AGV that completed its task when RMS did not send a callback.
steps.expected_outcome: The completed AGV is identified to the recovery function using its AGV ID.
steps.validation_check: The slide explicitly states that users can specify an AGV ID that has completed its task when RMS fails to send a callback.
steps.visual_region_hint: Bullet and explanatory text for 'Execute AGV command'

warnings: The slide does not provide exact UI fields, request format, or submission sequence.
The slide does not state the resulting system response after the command is executed.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Recovery action candidate: use Execute AGV command on the Aveva API page when RMS fails to send a callback for an AGV that completed its task. The slide only supports locating the function and specifying the AGV ID; additional execution details are not shown.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Resend a Geek command using its command GUID after an error
preconditions: A command was sent to Geek and encountered an error
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide lists the recovery capability 'Resend Geek Command' and explains that users can specify a command GUID for a command sent to Geek that encountered an error.

steps.instruction: Open the Aveva API page and locate the 'Resend Geek Command' function.
steps.expected_outcome: The resend recovery function is available for use.
steps.validation_check: The slide explicitly lists 'Resend Geek Command' as a recovery mechanism.
steps.visual_region_hint: Slide body bullet list under RMS crash recovery mechanisms

steps.instruction: Specify the command GUID for the command that was sent to Geek and encountered an error.
steps.expected_outcome: The errored command is identified by GUID for resend handling.
steps.validation_check: The slide states that users can specify a command GUID that was sent to Geek but encountered an error.
steps.visual_region_hint: Bullet and explanatory text for 'Resend Geek Command'

warnings: The slide does not provide exact submission steps, request parameters beyond command GUID, or confirmation behavior.
The slide does not describe when to avoid resending a command.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Recovery action candidate: use Resend Geek Command on the Aveva API page by specifying the command GUID for a command sent to Geek that encountered an error. The slide provides only high-level action guidance.
